name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Match-Mind
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Perform action '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant console/log output.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- **Backend Node Version:** (e.g., 18, 20)
- **Frontend Node Version:** (e.g., 18, 20)
- **Database:** (e.g., PostgreSQL 15, Redis 7)
- **Deployment:** (e.g., local, Vercel, Railway)

## Additional Context
- Which part of the app? (e.g., backend API, frontend UI, websocket, Stripe payment, AI chat)
- Error response from API (if applicable):
- Browser console errors:
